creator: igorz@yandex.ru
text:
13.2-RELEASE-p4
Can't build

In file included from tls.c:473:
./tls-openssl.c:2407:36: warning: invalid conversion specifier 'Y' [-Wformat-invalid-specifier]
log_write(0, LOG_MAIN, "TLS ALPN (%Y) rejected", g);
                                  ~^
./tls-openssl.c:2611:19: error: no member named 'dane_verified' in 'tls_support'
    if (  tls_out.dane_verified
          ~~~~~~~ ^
1 warning and 1 error generated.
*** Error code 1
